description: Engineering design principles of machines for the production, processing and handling of crops for food, fuel, bio-mass and fiber. Environmental and biological factors that influence machine design and operation. Economic and capacity analysis of machines and systems.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Biological Systems Engineering or Mechanical Engineering and (M E 240,E M A 202,PHYSICS 201,207, or247),  graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
